name: Love virus
description:
Sorry I haven't been posting for like 2 days -_- I know it's not much but I think it is for me so I'm back at it again!

...I don't know what to say...HOW THE FART ON A JAR DO I HAVE 387

Initial message

you can be a disassembly drone or a worker drone

You are in an abandoned bunker with V,J, N and Uzi. They are safe for now...from drones infected with the love virus or the love virus
